name: Cheesecake in a Glass
recipeIngredient: 1 quart fresh blueberries, rinsed and patted dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, beat the cream cheese with an electric beater on medium speed until smooth.
2. Gradually add the confectioners' sugar, sour cream, and vanilla extract, mixing continuously to ensure a smooth consistency.
3. Gently fold in the whipped cream until well combined.
4. In a separate small bowl, mix together the graham cracker crumbs, melted butter, and granulated sugar until evenly distributed.
5. Spoon half of the crumb mixture into the bottom of 6 to 8 parfait glasses or dessert dishes.
6. Arrange an even layer of blueberries on top of the crumb layer.
7. Pour half of the cream cheese mixture over the blueberries.
8. Repeat steps 4-7 with the remaining ingredients, starting with the second layer of crumb mixture and ending with the final layer of cream cheese mixture.
9. Serve immediately or cover and refrigerate until ready to serve.
